{{Quote|It's not very roomy, but I think it's turned out all right. And it's close to Yavin IV, where I got most of my parts. Nobody comes here except the smugglers and Trandoshans anyway, so I get left alone the way I like it.|[[Suvam Tan]]|<ref name="KotOR" />}}
'''Yavin Station''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] that had been built in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] of [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin Prime]].

==History==
{{Quote|This station is an old Republic supply depot from when they were fighting Exar Kun. Once they destroyed Yavin IV's surface, though, they didn't need it anymore. Once they'd gone, I decided to move in and use the place myself.|Suvam Tan|<ref name="KotOR" />}}
During the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], the station was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] supply depot. The station was abandoned after the [[Battle of Yavin 4 (Great Sith War)|defeat]] of [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] and the bombing of Exar's stronghold on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="KotOR" />

A former [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] of Exar's forces, known as [[Suvam Tan]], later took up residence in the station, using it as a base for scavenging on Yavin 4. He would trade the salvage with [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshans]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] that came through, in exchange for [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] and supplies. During the [[Jedi Civil War]], [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] encountered Yavin Station and Suvam. In exchange for Revan's [[Skirmish on Yavin Station|help against]] the Trandoshans (who had grown unruly due to [[Davik Kang]]'s death), Suvam supplied the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] with a variety of powerful and rare equipment.<ref name="KotOR" />

Eventually, Yavin Station began to crumble due to the poor quality of the [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] [[Ore/Legends|ore]] in the alloys used to build the station. Suvam hid several of his most prized possessions on locations on the three habitable [[Moon/Legends|moons]] of Yavin, and sent a data crystal containing the information to his son on [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]].<ref name="Wizards" /> The station was still intact by the time of the [[Galactic War]] three centuries later, but sometime after that,<ref name="TOR">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Shadow of Revan]]''</ref> the station exploded, propelling it into [[Yavin 22]].<ref name="Wizards" />

The station and Suvam's body were discovered four millennia later by his descendant, [[Suz Tanwa]].<ref name="Wizards" />

==Behind the scenes==
"[[Yavin: The Big Red One]]" originally stated that the station was destroyed shortly after the Jedi Civil War,<ref name="Wizards" /> but ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Shadow of Revan]]'' shows the station intact over three centuries afterwards.<ref name="TOR" /> As the station is found in 0 BBY on Yavin 22, this article assumes that the station still exploded sometime after ''Shadow of Revan''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
